titleStmt.title: SII 30.260: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 260. (A.R. No. 612 of 1915.) Teṉmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Tripuranāthēśvara temple-on the south wall of the central shrine Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 8: 13th c. A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the royal order of making gift of land to meet the expenses of the temple of Tiruppāttīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār including tiruppaḍimāṟṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar Eṭṭāvatu prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumuka pāṇṭiyac caturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruppāttiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉā
ṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukku Innāyaṉār civaṉā ruppaṭiye muṉṟum ve kārāṇmaiyuṅ kāriyavārāṭciyuṅ kaṭamaiyu mantarā
yamum poṉvariyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcipili cantivikkiramap peṟu maṟṟu Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu tiruccūlattāpaṉam nāṭṭi Ippaṭi candrātittavar ce
lvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattukka riyatevaṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉāṉa miṉavataraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai kiḻcce
mpināṭṭu Iḷāntaiyāṉa teventiranallūr caṅkaṉmāṉaṭikaḷāṉa Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya viḻupparai ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 30.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
